management.emptySubDesc: There are no digital employees yet. Click the button below to create your first one.
management.deleteConfirmBody: Delete digital employee __DH_NAME__? All data under this employee will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
management.deleteNameLabel: Enter the digital employee name to confirm deletion:
management.validateNameRequired: Please enter the digital employee name
management.deleteFailed: Delete failed. Please try again later

errors.loadDetailFailed: Failed to load digital employee details

basic.editIntro: Define the name, bio, and core responsibilities of the digital employee.

skill.sectionDesc: Choose skills for this digital employee, or create new skills in natural language.
skill.tooltipBuiltinSkill: Basic skill required at runtime; cannot be removed

skillUpload.confirmCancelContent: Upload is in progress. Cancel will abort the upload. Continue?
skillUpload.dragHint: Click or drag a file here to upload
skillUpload.successDesc: Your skill was imported. You can view it in the skill list.

knowledge.sectionDesc: Link business knowledge networks (BKN). The digital employee will answer and act using this knowledge.

appAccountModal.title: Bind app account
appAccountModal.subtitle: Select an app account to access business knowledge networks
appAccountModal.tokenFailed: Failed to get app account token
appAccountModal.nameRequired: Please enter an app account name
appAccountModal.unbound: No app account configured. Configure one before selecting knowledge.
appAccountModal.unboundKnowledgeWarning: Configured business knowledge networks are currently unavailable. Bind an app account so the digital employee can access them.
appAccountModal.deleteContent: After deletion, the digital employee cannot access linked business knowledge networks. Continue?

appPolicyModal.title: Configure query permission for business knowledge networks
appPolicyModal.desc: Configure query permissions for the app account so the digital employee can access data in business knowledge networks. The validity period defaults to never expiring.
appPolicyModal.loadFailed: Failed to load app account permissions
appPolicyModal.saveFailed: Failed to configure app account permissions

channel.sectionDesc: Configure channels the digital employee can use, such as DingTalk or Feishu.
channel.descDingtalk: Receive messages and handle tasks in the DingTalk client
channel.descFeishu: Receive messages and handle tasks in the Feishu client

channelModal.configFailed: Save failed. Please try again later.
